name: kaspa-raffle-static-v0
description: Static Mainnet and Testnet 12 raffle dApp for Kaspa Toccata.

scripts.compile:contract: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_v1 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v9_tn12 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v9_mainnet
scripts.verify: npm run build && node scripts/verify-single-file.mjs && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs && node scripts/verify-v9-refund-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-million-users.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer-package.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer.mjs
scripts.verify:covenant: npm run build && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs
